text.message: It’s not easy being black in America man
Oj are we racing sheep port?
We actually gotta mob black for a bit early imo
you got time but take it first in case i get some lucky dev
i told you they wont roll
wdym told you guys we all saw it
well i think that will happen anyways
Oj played w me last game
nah just meant you didnt block the 9 a lot
blues gotten 3 devs and a city since my nines lol
im just suprised im last to city though atleast id beat red
port for sheep and id trade?
well wouldnt do much since i need to port what i get
cant be letting you grow twice my friend
yea oj we need you to dev
ill do my best still no sheep
okay i guess i wont road
i got ore if that helps
i already lost all my space
if you have this you get it all back
I think oj is doing better then me
I stuck at 7 for quite some time now
are you tho blue are you tho
really hoped you had a knight there black
